title: leucas spiculifolia
intro: Leucas spiculifolia, also known as the spiky snakeroot, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae that is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leucas spiculifolia include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Leucas spiculifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical paste, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
